visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit warehouse supermarket, a woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a black dress with a chest cutout and dangling white earrings, picks up a large plastic bag filled with brown bread loaves. She gestures toward the bread while standing in front of bakery shelves stacked with various pastries. Shoppers with carts are visible in the blurred background. (2) The camera focuses on price tags on a metal shelf displaying the text 'BLACK OLIVE CHEESE BREAD' and '$269'. The woman's hand points to the price while she speaks directly to the camera. Large red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logos are overlaid at the top. (3) The scene transitions to a warm indoor living room setting where the same woman and another woman wearing a black beret and white top sit at a table. They hold up halves of a sliced bread loaf to show the internal texture, which contains dark bits. A wooden cutting board with a knife and bread slices sits on the table in the foreground. (4) Close-up shots of the bread loaf on the wooden board show its bumpy, brownish crust and the internal airy crumb with olives and nuts. The two women are seen reacting with facial expressions of enjoyment and nodding while pointing at the bread.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 倒數最後一包. [Variety]: 倒數最後一包. (2) [Subtitle]: 好市多新上 黑橄欖乳酪麵包. [Variety]: 黑橄欖乳酪麵包. (3) [Subtitle]: 裡面有 黑橄欖跟乳酪 哇 那麼的義式. (4) [Subtitle]: 有沒有人愛吃橄欖啊 我不愛 它聞起來很香哎. (5) [Subtitle]: 有點像你買那個 Subway的那個潛艇堡的香氣 哦 那麼厲害嗎. (6) [Subtitle]: 那個回去看看他的新口味 269元 有兩大個 黑橄欖跟乳酪 其實蠻貴的. (7) [Subtitle]: 我覺得這價格OK 感覺加熱狗跟奶油就超好吃的 嗯 我們來回去試看看. (8) [Subtitle]: 最重要是現場 這些都不是哦 最後一包 最後兩組 看來賣得很好. (9) [Subtitle]: 好市多最新口味的 黑橄欖乳酪麵包. [Variety]: 黑橄欖乳酪麵包. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得非常誠意 這次味道截然不同 橄欖烤起來非常的香 而且吃起來就是很順. (11) [Subtitle]: 裡面有非常多的核桃量 乳酪的話則是偏少 可是這個烤完就是一個超完美 超香的好麵包. (12) [Subtitle]: 它的橄欖比較是香氣 不會有那個很可怕的橄欖味 對 我覺得這麵包非常值得 1-10分 我會給 9分. [Variety]: 9分. (13) [Subtitle]: 你拿來早餐不管是配蛋單吃或者加奶油 哇 都完美.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters, approximately 6 background shoppers and staff in the Costco warehouse.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary character wears a black dress with a keyhole/cutout neckline and white statement earrings. The secondary character wears a black beret and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse bakery section with industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and bakery boxes. The second location is a cozy indoor living room with a couch, soft pillows, and a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal female voice speaking excitedly in Mandarin over a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady 4/4 beat. A distinct 'ding' sound effect highlights the text on screen. In the background, a low-level murmur of supermarket activity and the rustling of a large plastic bread bag are clearly audible. (2) As the speaker discusses the bread's price, the vocal intensity remains high with frequent pitch fluctuations. The BGM maintains a consistent rhythmic drive. Sharp transient sounds like plastic crinkling and the 'whoosh' of a camera transition punctuate the speech. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a drier, indoor room tone as the narrative moves home. Two female voices interact, creating a playful conversational layer. The sound of bread being sliced or placed on a wooden board creates low-bandwidth thudding noises. (4) The final phase features a mix of evaluative speech and enthusiastic reactions. Synthesized 'pop' and 'magic sparkle' SFX are layered over the voices to emphasize points of interest, while the high-frequency BGM keeps the energy levels high until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review of a new bakery item at Costco Taiwan. It captures the initial 'find' in the store to build a sense of urgency, then transitions to an at-home taste test and detailed sensory evaluation to convince the viewer of the product's value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While focusing on a specific retailer's product, it presents as a personal discovery/review vlog rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-density text overlays and upbeat music typical of social media trending reviews to maintain high viewer engagement.
